gap.$description: Layer 1 (locked, universal). Icon to text inline — buttons, breadcrumbs, links.
Layer 1 (locked, universal). Label to value within a single field.
Layer 1 (locked, universal). Radio or checkbox to its label.
Layer 1 (locked, universal). Interactive element to interactive element.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Between cards in a list or grid.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Field to field within a form.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Section to section on a page.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Section heading to body content below it.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Content group to primary CTA button.
Layer 2 (product-scoped, GDS-M). Hero band to first content block.
